creator: smyru@heron.pl
text:
On Sun, 20 Jan 2008 14:46:13 GMT, miwi wrote
> 
> The port does not build. Can you take a look at it?
> 
> http://head.miwibox.org/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1855
> http://amd64.miwibox.org/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1882

Well, after having a look at the logs, it seems to me that the port 
builds fine. The only problem I have noticed, is that the pkg-plist 
seemed to be broken as it contained a reference of contacts.glade, 
that was removed, and that is why the package stage returned 
errors. 

Are you sure the patches, I sent, applied cleanly for you? If you 
take a look at the patch, it is removing the contacts.glade file. A 
package was build clean here - not errors.

I will prepare a new patch, and sent it back to you as I noticed 
that I overlooked man file.
-- 
 Piotr Smyrak
 piotr.smyrak@heron.pl
